markets.question: FC Metz vs. AS Monaco FC: O/U 3.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game between FC Metz and AS Monaco FC, scheduled for May 2 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if FC Metz and AS Monaco FC combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue1.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FC Metz vs. AS Monaco FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Ligue 1 game, scheduled for May 2 at 1:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: FC Metz sit 18th in Ligue 1 with 26 points from 30 matches, mired in a relegation scrap, hosting seventh-placed AS Monaco on May 2 at Stade Saint-Symphorien amid a mounting injury crisis including Maxime Colin (calf), Boubacar Traoré (knee), and Believe Munongo out. Metz's porous defense concedes heavily, worsened by recent struggles against bottom-table rivals. Monaco, with 49 points from 29 games, endured a 4-1 loss to Paris FC last week despite Folarin Balogun extending his scoring streak to nine straight appearances and Paul Pogba's injury return, but remain potent away with an unbeaten run in eight head-to-heads versus Metz, capped by September's 5-2 win. Monaco's long-term absentees like Takumi Minamino (knee) and Mohammed Salisu (cruciate) test depth, yet their form and matchup edge shape trader consensus toward visiting superiority in this table-climbing fixture.

markets.question: Total Kills Over/Under 20.5 in Game 1?
markets.description:
In the upcoming match between Fnatic and Team Heretics in the LEC Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 2 at 11:00AM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 1.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 1 is 21 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: LoL: Fnatic vs Team Heretics (BO3) - LEC Regular Season
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Fnatic and Team Heretics in the LEC Regular Season, initially scheduled for May 2 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Fnatic" if Fnatic win the match against Team Heretics.

This market will resolve to "Team Heretics" if Team Heretics win the match against Fnatic.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the LEC Spring 2026 regular season Week 6 BO3, Fnatic (2-5, 39% game win rate) holds a clear edge over Team Heretics (1-6, 19% game win rate) in trader consensus, both eliminated from playoffs after Week 5. Fnatic's recent form shows resilience with a 2-0 sweep over Shifters but 1-2 losses to undefeated Karmine Corp and Natus Vincere, exposing mid-lane vulnerabilities in tough matchups. Heretics languishes on a six-series skid, including 0-2 defeats to Movistar KOI and Karmine Corp. Historically, Fnatic leads head-to-head 10-5 overall, despite Heretics' 1-0 upset earlier this split; stable rosters and current meta favor Fnatic's veteran core in this low-stakes clash.

events.title: Moreirense FC vs. CF Estrela da Amadora - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Primeira Liga game, scheduled for May 2 at 10:30 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Moreirense hold a solid seventh place in the Primeira Liga standings with 39 points from 30 matches, bolstered by a recent 1-0 home win over Estoril that ended a three-game skid, showcasing defensive resilience at Parque de Jogos Comendador Joaquim de Almeida Freitas. Estrela da Amadora languish in 15th, fighting relegation with a poor away record, following their goalless draw against Moreirense in December. Head-to-head favors Moreirense overall (5 wins in 10), though recent meetings are tight. Minor injuries sideline Moreirense's Vasco Sousa (long-term fibula) and Estrela's Jefferson Encada (muscle since March), but full squads expected; late-season stakes heighten Estrela's motivation amid table pressures and home/away splits.

markets.question: FCV Farul Constanţa vs. FC Botoşani: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Romania SuperLiga game between FCV Farul Constanţa and FC Botoşani, scheduled for May 2 at 10:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both FCV Farul Constanţa and FC Botoşani each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

events.title: FCV Farul Constanţa vs. FC Botoşani - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Romania SuperLiga game, scheduled for May 2 at 10:30 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the SuperLiga relegation round, third-placed FC Botoșani hold an edge over seventh-placed FCV Farul Constanța ahead of their May 2 clash at Stadionul Central, where both sides vie to distance from the drop zone amid tight standings. Botoșani's momentum stems from a 1-0 friendly win over Farul in January, building on solid away form, while Farul leverages strong home record, including a 2-0 league victory versus Botoșani last November. Key absences include Farul's centre-back Lucas Pellegrini (broken tibia, out until September) and Botoșani's centre-back Rijad Sadiku (cruciate ligament tear) plus goalkeeper Giannis Anestis (muscular issue). Head-to-head tilts toward draws historically, with trader consensus reflecting Botoșani's higher table position and recent edge despite mutual defensive vulnerabilities.

markets.question: Game 1: Both Teams Destroy Inhibitors?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. In League of Legends, each team has three inhibitors (one in each lane), located behind the inner turrets.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Team WE and JD Gaming each destroy at least one enemy inhibitor during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy inhibitors.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one inhibitor prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

eventMetadata.context_description: JD Gaming holds a commanding edge over Team WE in their LPL Split 2 Group Ascend BO3 rematch, fresh off a 2-1 series win against the same opponent just one week ago on April 25, which extended JDG's five-series win streak amid strong mid-table positioning at 5-3 overall (11-7 games). Team WE, mired in a six-series loss streak including a recent defeat to Bilibili Gaming, struggles with consistency despite snagging a game in their last meeting, ranking near the bottom of the eight-team Group Ascend where top-four finishers secure direct playoff berths. Historical head-to-head favors JDG at 88% win rate, with no reported roster changes or patch shifts altering the stylistic matchup dynamics.

markets.question: Game 1: Any Player Quadra Kill?
markets.description:
This market is about whether any player achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. In League of Legends, a Quadra Kill occurs when a single player kills 4 enemy champions in rapid succession.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player on either team achieves a Quadra Kill during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if no player achieves a Quadra Kill. A Penta Kill (5 kills in rapid succession) also counts as a Quadra Kill having occurred for the purposes of this market.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 1 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether a Quadra Kill occurred prior to stoppage. If no Quadra Kill occurred, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

AG Super Play, boasting veterans like YiNuo and recent roster additions XiaoYu and Jiushu, scraped through Round 1 with a gritty 3-2 comeback over RW Mania four days ago, showcasing resilience amid a subpar KPL Spring where they failed to defend their title. No roster changes or injuries reported; trader consensus reflects AG's superior head-to-head experience and map control edge in extended BO7 series, though WST's momentum poses upset potential in this high-stakes knockout.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Moscow be 24°C or higher on May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by NOAA at the Vnukovo International Airport in degrees Celsius on 3 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=UUWW

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket closely mirrors the latest ensemble forecasts from ECMWF, GFS, and Russia's Hydrometeorological Center (Roshydromet), converging on a daytime high near 19–21°C for Moscow on May 3 amid mild southerly flow and partial cloudiness. The tight race among 20°C (31%), 21°C (29.5%), and 19°C (25%) reflects subtle model divergences: warmer GFS runs anticipate more afternoon clearing for peaks above 20°C, while ECMWF implies lingering low clouds capping at 19°C, with wind speeds of 3–5 m/s influencing boundary layer mixing and insolation. Early May climatology supports this range, with historical highs averaging 15–18°C, though recent stable high-pressure ridging has held temperatures seasonably mild. New observational data and Roshydromet updates expected within hours could refine the peak before resolution based on official Vnukovo station readings.

markets.question: Will Russia enter Dobropillia by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if, according to the ISW map, Russia captures any territory of Dobropillia by June 30, 2026, at 11:59 PM ET.

This market refers to the city of Dobropillia (48.47, 37.08), which borders Sviatohorivka and Hannivka. Other Ukrainian towns/cities named Dobropillia will not be considered for resolution.

Territory will be considered captured if any part of Dobropillia is shaded under a below specified layer on the ISW map (https://storymaps.arcgis.com/stories/36a7f6a6f5a9448496de641cf64bd375) by the resolution date. Otherwise, the market will resolve to “No”.

For any change on the ISW map to qualify for this market’s resolution, the relevant shading indicating Russian control must persist through the next full ISW daily update cycle. If ISW skips a day, shading must persist until the next finalized ISW update is published, regardless of the date. Any continuous shading which reflects either "Assessed Russian Infiltration Areas in Ukraine", “Assessed Russian Control”, “Assessed Russian Advance In Ukraine”, or “Assessed Russian Gains in the Past 24 Hours” will qualify. 

Once a qualifying condition is met, any subsequent loss of control will not be considered towards the resolution of this market.

If Russia comes into control of the specified territory as a result of a negotiated settlement, this will qualify for a 'Yes' resolution, regardless of whether it is shaded red in the ISW map. However, an announcement of a negotiated settlement that gives Russia de jure control will not qualify. Actual control must be established.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the ISW Ukraine map. If the ISW map is rendered unavailable, information from DeepStateMap (https://deepstatemap.live/) may be used. If information from both the ISW and DeepStateMap are rendered permanently unavailable, a consensus of credible reporting may be used.

Note: Any temporary glitches or errors in the map will not be considered.

If information from both the ISW and DeepStateMap are rendered permanently unavailable, a consensus of credible reporting may be used.

Note: Any temporary glitches or errors in the map will not be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: Russian forces continue limited ground assaults east of Dobropillia in Donetsk Oblast but achieved no advances as of May 1, 2026, according to Institute for the Study of War assessments, amid Ukrainian counterattacks near Bilytske and special operations raids capturing Russian troops. Over the past week, incremental Russian gains occurred in adjacent areas like southern Novopavlivka, though overall progress remains slow at under 6 square kilometers per day earlier this year, hampered by Ukrainian defenses, drone warfare, and fiber-optic "sleeper drones." Heavy bombardment has devastated the town, prompting evacuations, while positional fighting persists without confirmed entry into Dobropillia proper. No major scheduled events loom, leaving outcomes tied to reinforcement flows and attrition rates.

markets.question: Will "Bully - Ye" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

Levante's defensive frailties deepen with suspensions for Iván Romero and injuries to Kareem Tunde, Roger Brugué, Elgezabal, and Unai Vencedor, likely prompting a low-block approach that inflates corners against Villarreal's possession-dominant home style averaging 9.6 total corners per game. markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Imperial Academy vs Infinite (BO3) - United21 Playoffs
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket quarterfinal 1 match between Imperial Academy and Infinite in the United21 Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 9 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Imperial Academy" if Imperial Academy win the match against Infinite.

This market will resolve to "Infinite" if Infinite win the match against Imperial Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: INFINITE enters as the higher-ranked squad at #65 HLTV with a seven-match win streak, including a Parken Challenger Championship Season 5 title and strong Esplay Elite Gaming Cup 1 performances fueled by recent roster boosts like sl3nd (1.29 rating) and Dytor. Imperial Academy (#224 HLTV), fresh off a 2-1 upset win over INFINITE in United21 Season 47 playoffs upper bracket round 1 on April 9, has since slumped with a 37.5% win rate, exiting Season 48 groups 0-2 against INFURITY Gaming and BIG Academy amid shaky form from ta9z and Kragh. Traders eye Infinite's trading and opening prowess versus Imperial Academy's clutch potential in BO3 format, with no major roster or patch shifts in the last 48 hours.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Houston be between 54-55°F on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the William P. Hobby Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 4 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the William P. Hobby Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/tx/houston/KHOU.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump visit China on May 12, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the calendar date (ET) on which U.S. President Donald Trump next visits China.

For the purpose of this market, a "visit" is defined as Trump physically entering the terrestrial or maritime territory of the listed country. Whether or not Trump enters the country's airspace during the timeframe of this market will have no bearing on a positive resolution.

The primary resolution source for this information will be official information from government of the United States of America, official information from Trump or released by his verified social media accounts (e.g. https://twitter.com/POTUS), however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

Elena Rybakina trails closely at 23.5%, reflecting her exceptional serving edge—proven by her 2022 Wimbledon triumph—and league-leading 27-5 record, capped by the Stuttgart title over Karolina Muchová. Iga Świątek's 16.1% share acknowledges her breakthrough 2025 Wimbledon win over Amanda Anisimova but tempers expectations given historical grass-court inconsistencies amid the clay-to-grass transition. The bunched top probabilities underscore a wide-open draw, with grass specialists like Rybakina and resurgent threats including Anisimova (7.5%) keeping the field competitive ahead of British tune-up events.

eventMetadata.context_description: CFTC's March 2026 advisory (Letter 26-08) has sharpened focus on Designated Contract Markets self-certifying sports event contracts, mandating pre-listing staff consultations, detailed manipulation risk analyses, and reliable settlement data to ensure market integrity. Established DCMs like CME and Kalshi have already listed hundreds of such prediction market contracts, capitalizing on hedging demand from sports leagues and broadcasters, while challengers including Railbird and Aristotle weigh commercial viability against regulatory hurdles. State attorneys general and tribal gaming interests decry these as encroaching on sportsbooks, fueling litigation risks. With the June 30 deadline looming, traders eye upcoming CFTC responses to recent ANPRM comments for catalysts that could prompt or deter further certifications.

markets.question: Will Meta have the #1 AI model at the end of May 2026 (Style Control On)?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the highest arena rank (Style Control On) based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control on will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (LOW) $3.75 Week of May 4 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of May 4 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will the next model released by OpenAI debut at a score of at least 1500?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the next model released by OpenAI has at least the specified score on the Arena.AI Leaderboard (arena.ai/leaderboard/text) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on the date after the day of the release, 12:00 PM ET.  Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Results from the "Score" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

If no qualifying score for the specified model is available on the Arena.AI Leaderboard at 12:00 PM ET following the date of the release, this market will resolve based on the first subsequent instance at which such a score becomes available on the leaderboard. If no qualifying score becomes available by the end of the seventh day following the day of the model’s release, or if no qualifying model release occurs by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

If multiple models are released on the same calendar date or if multiple variants of the specified model appear on the Arena.AI Leaderboard at the relevant check time (e.g., base, “Thinking,” or “Instant”), the highest-scoring variant will be used for resolution.

A qualifying model must be launched and publicly accessible, including via open beta or open rolling waitlist signups. A closed beta or any form of private access will not suffice. The release must be either clearly defined and publicly announced as being accessible to the general public or otherwise made publicly accessible and explicitly labeled within the company’s official website. Labeling errors, placeholder text, or version names displayed on the website that do not correspond to a model that is actually accessible to the general public will not qualify.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at arena.ai/leaderboard/text. If this resolution source is unavailable at 12:00 PM ET following the date of the release, this market will resolve based on the first subsequent instance at which such a score becomes available on the leaderboard. If it remains unavailable through the end of the seventh day after a qualifying release, it will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will Discord’s market cap be $30B or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Discord's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by June 30, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Discord’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket assigns a 79.5% implied probability to no Discord IPO by June 30, 2026, driven by the absence of public S-1 filing or roadshow announcements since the company's confidential SEC submission in January 2026, which targeted a March debut that never materialized. Secondary market valuations have compressed to $7-10 billion from the 2021 funding round peak of $15 billion, reflecting SaaS multiple contraction, modest revenue growth to around $725 million ARR, and challenges pivoting from gaming-centric users to enterprise adoption amid a cautious tech IPO environment. Conditional on an IPO, traders price <15B market cap at 16.3%, with higher brackets below 3% due to limited upside catalysts; watch for potential regulatory filings ahead of the deadline.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping purge Wang Huning in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if either of the following conditions are met by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

1) The listed individual is removed or resigns from their primary political post or from their position, if any, on the Chinese Politburo or its standing committee, with a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor.

2) The listed individual is expelled from the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). 

Qualifying announcements and reporting of a purge before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal/expulsion goes into effect.

A listed individual leaving office at the end of a regularly scheduled term, or being removed/resigning from office without a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor, will not qualify.

The resolution sources for this market will be information from the Chinese Government and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Xi Jinping's anti-corruption campaign has intensified in 2026, most notably with the April 3 announcement of a probe into Politburo member Ma Xingrui for "serious violations of party discipline and state laws"—the third such ouster of a Politburo figure in six months, after top Central Military Commission (CMC) vice chairmen Zhang Youxia and He Weidong. This extends a sweeping purge of over 100 senior People's Liberation Army (PLA) officers since 2022, creating leadership vacancies and signaling efforts to ensure loyalty ahead of the 2027 21st Party Congress. markets.question: Spread: FC Barcelona (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming UEFA Women's Champions League game, scheduled for May 3 at 10:30 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "FC Barcelona" if FC Barcelona win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "FC Bayern München".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. Bayern, unbeaten domestically this season atop the Frauen-Bundesliga save for a 7-1 group-stage drubbing by Barcelona in October 2025, advanced via a gritty 5-3 aggregate over Manchester City with late strikes from Viggósdóttir and Dallmann. First leg on April 25 in Munich favors Bayern's home crowd and revenge motive, but Barcelona's depth shines despite Aitana Bonmatí's ongoing fibula absence until early May; Bayern miss winger Klara Bühl (muscle injury). Head-to-head favors Barça (4-1-0), underscoring trader focus on aggregate dynamics, clean sheets, and Salma Paralluelo's form.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in San Francisco be between 60-61°F on May 4?

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the San Francisco International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/ca/san-francisco/KSFO.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: National Weather Service guidance indicates a forecasted high near 64°F for San Francisco on May 4 amid persistent "May Gray" conditions, with morning marine stratus delaying burn-off and capping afternoon warming under steady onshore flow. Recent days reflect this pattern, as May 1 logged a morning low of 54°F with partial clearing insufficient for peaks above the low 60s, aligning with climatological norms where early May highs average 65°F at KSFO station. NOAA model ensembles show limited ridging aloft, reducing intensification potential, though deeper marine layers could trim 2-3°F. Traders eye evening forecast updates and hourly observations for shifts, given historical variability from full fog dissipation.

markets.question: Will Momentum win the third-most seats in the House of Representatives in the 2026 Maltese general election?
markets.description:
General elections are scheduled to be held in Malta on May 30, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the third-greatest number of seats in the House of Representatives (parliament of Malta) as a result of the 2026 Maltese general election.

If the results of this election are not known definitively by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

Parties will primarily be ranked by the number of seats won. In the event of a tie, the party with the greater number of valid votes will rank higher. If a tie persists, the party whose name appears first in alphabetical order will rank higher. This market will resolve to the party that occupies the third-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

This market’s resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the House of Representatives in the 2026 Maltese general election, not any coalition it may be a part of.

This market will resolve based on the results of the 2026 Maltese general election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve solely on the official results reported by the Government of Malta, such as those published by the Electoral Commission of Malta (https://electoral.gov.mt/).

Bayern Munich's table-topping form and Kane's recent strikes, including in the DFB-Pokal semifinal and league wins, underscore his dominance, bolstered by no reported injury concerns. Realistic challenges would require a severe Kane injury sidelining him entirely, paired with multiple rivals like Undav, Luis Díaz, or Serhou Guirassy posting unprecedented hat-trick runs in every finale fixture—scenarios markets deem negligible given the gap and Bayern's schedule strength.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy, Team Spirit's academy squad with a revamped roster since February featuring riflers VILBy, mazay, and Kiryasoo, entered Exort Series #25 Main Stage Round 1 as a higher-tier contender after mixed results in prior C-Tier events like Winline Insight. Wave Esports, HLTV-ranked #149 with recent additions like Belof and sheezy, advanced from Contenders Stage (3-1 record) but carried a 37.5% three-month win rate amid inconsistent form in qualifiers like Urban Riga Open. No roster changes or patch impacts reported pre-match; trader consensus weighed Spirit's map pool edges on Mirage and Inferno against Wave's underdog upset potential in BO3 swiss format, with no major news in the prior 48 hours.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects tight uncertainty in Singapore's highest temperature on May 4, with 30–32°C outcomes each hovering around 21% implied probability amid inter-monsoon conditions. The Meteorological Service Singapore's 30 April fortnightly outlook forecasts daily maximums of 33–35°C on most days in early May, tempered by afternoon thundery showers and above-average rainfall that often cap peak heating through increased cloud cover and evaporative cooling. Differentiating factors include shower onset timing—earlier convection favors 30–31°C, while delayed storms allow brief 32°C spikes—and light variable winds enhancing land-sea breeze circulation. Historical May averages near 31°C align with this clustering, though recent April heatwaves exceeded 35°C frequently; watch for 24-hour forecast updates tomorrow clarifying May 4 convective patterns.

markets.question: Will Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) hit (HIGH) $95 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.HOOD%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the VA-01 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the VA-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

Incumbent Rep. Eugene Vindman, who announced his reelection bid in February 2026, benefits from this shift in a district previously held by Republican Rob Wittman, now rated Solid D by forecasters like Cook Political Report. No major polls have emerged post-redistricting, but the structural change has sidelined Republican chances ahead of the August 4 primaries and November general election, with GOP challengers facing an uphill battle in the new electoral math.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (HIGH) $6.50 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Tel Aviv be 18°C or below on May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by NOAA at the Ben Gurion International Airport in degrees Celsius on 3 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=LLBG

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a 44% implied probability for Tel Aviv's highest temperature reaching 26°C on May 3, with 33% for 25°C, reflecting the latest Israel Meteorological Service guidance and ECMWF/GFS model runs projecting daytime peaks in the 25-27°C range amid a stabilizing high-pressure ridge over the eastern Mediterranean. This follows May 1's cooler 22°C high and May 2's warming to around 25-26°C under light northerly winds that limit sea breeze cooling, clear skies promoting solar heating, and warm sea surface temperatures near 20°C. Afternoon westerly gusts to 25 mph introduce uncertainty, potentially capping intensity at 25°C, while sunnier persistence could push toward 27°C. Official IMS station observations will resolve the market, with hourly data available throughout the day.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors no replacement for Iran at the 2026 FIFA World Cup (87.5% implied probability), driven by FIFA President Gianni Infantino's recent reaffirmation of Iran's participation and plans to play group stage matches in the United States, despite the nation's absence from the Vancouver FIFA Congress. Geopolitical tensions, including Iran's travel ban to "hostile" countries like the US co-host and signals of potential withdrawal over security concerns, have fueled speculation, but no official exit has materialized. A Trump envoy's April proposal to slot in Italy was swiftly rejected by Italian officials as "shameful," with FIFA sources confirming no replacement plans. Italy lingers at 6.6% on lingering buzz, while AFC playoff contenders like UAE remain marginal. Realistic challenges include an eleventh-hour Iranian pullout or FIFA enforcing a ban for non-participation, though tournament proximity limits upheaval.

markets.question: Will Encore Medical’s market cap be between $50M and $55M at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Encore Medical’s market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

As of market creation, the IPO is scheduled to price on April 22 (ET). If no such IPO occurs by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before June 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency.

It is calculated as the total number of outstanding shares, multiplied by the official closing share price of the publicly traded class on the first trading day.

If necessary, to accurately capture the company’s total market capitalization, rather than a stock-class-specific market capitalization, the calculation will include all outstanding share classes and apply any stated conversion ratios to the publicly traded class. Where no conversion right exists, such shares will be counted at their stated outstanding amount without discount, unless official filings explicitly specify differently.

The number of outstanding shares will be determined from official company filings or disclosures (e.g., SEC filings). The closing share price on the first trading day will be determined from the primary exchange’s official listing page.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official company filings and the primary exchange’s official listing page. The market capitalization will be determined through appropriate calculation using the total outstanding shares and the closing price from the first day of trading.

In the event of an interruption in the normal trading session on the specified company’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that day as the first day of trading for the purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment on Polymarket reflects growing skepticism toward Encore Medical's IPO timeline and valuation, with no IPO before June 2026 leading at 37% implied probability amid repeated delays. The medtech firm, developing transcatheter PFO closure devices, filed its S-1 in September 2025 with multiple amendments, missing the targeted April 22, 2026 NYSE American listing despite late-April rumors of a May 6 debut at $5 per share for 3 million shares to raise $15 million. TTM revenue rose 49% to $2.1 million with 40% gross margins, but a $1.6 million net loss and ongoing FDA pivotal trial (target completion 2027) cap enthusiasm for higher brackets like 55M+ at just 1.8%. Upcoming pricing and SEC effectiveness remain key catalysts.

markets.question: Will Jared Kushner attend the next US x Iran diplomatic meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual attends the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not qualify as diplomatic meetings.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

Attendance refers to the listed individual being physically present and actively participating in negotiations at the meeting.

If the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran takes place over multiple days, attendance at any part of the meeting will qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Amid a fragile two-week ceasefire extended by President Trump on April 7, US-Iran indirect peace talks—mediated by Oman and Pakistan—center on reopening the Strait of Hormuz and suspending Tehran's nuclear program, with negotiations stalled despite recent proposals. Trump reviewed Iran's latest offer on April 27 prioritizing the strait while delaying nuclear curbs, deeming it insufficient as of May 1, fueling trader focus on backchannel progress. Prior Islamabad rounds featured US Vice President JD Vance, special envoy Steve Witkoff, and adviser Jared Kushner facing Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf. No date is confirmed for the next round, but diplomats signal ongoing efforts amid escalation risks.

markets.question: Sinner vs. Zverev: Match O/U 21.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Jannik Sinner and Alexander Zverev in the Madrid Open, originally scheduled for May 3, 2026 at 11:00AM ET.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 22. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."

events.title: Madrid Open: Jannik Sinner vs Alexander Zverev
events.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Jannik Sinner and Alexander Zverev in the Madrid Open, originally scheduled for May 3, 2026 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Jannik Sinner' if Jannik Sinner advances against Alexander Zverev.

This market will resolve to 'Alexander Zverev' if Alexander Zverev advances against Jannik Sinner.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Jannik Sinner enters the Mutua Madrid Open final with a commanding 9-4 head-to-head edge over Alexander Zverev, including no losses since the 2023 US Open, fueling trader consensus on the world No. 1's clay-court prowess despite Zverev's strong high-altitude history here. Sinner advanced via a clinical 6-2, 6-4 semifinal win over Arthur Fils for his 350th career victory, extending a potential fifth straight ATP Masters 1000 title run, while Zverev ousted Alexander Blockx 6-2, 7-5 after earlier cryptic physical discomfort post-R16 win over Terence Atmane—no major injury reports have surfaced for either. The Sunday showdown on faster Madrid clay tests Zverev's serve and baseline power against Sinner's return game, with minimal rest but clear weather forecast.

markets.question: Will Meta have the second best AI model at the end of May 2026?
markets.description:

markets.question: Will Ron DeSantis join the Trump administration by June 30?
markets.description:

The Trump administration includes individuals formally appointed or nominated by Donald Trump to roles within the U.S. federal government, such as Cabinet members, Executive Office staff, senior policy advisors, ambassadors, or White House staff whose appointments are publicly announced by official government channels.

Nominations will qualify even if the individual is not confirmed.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the US government; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Gardner Minshew start Week 1 for the Chiefs in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the listed player who is the starting quarterback for the Kansas City Chiefs in their Week 1 regular season game of the 2026-2027 NFL season.

If the Chiefs do not name a single player as the starting quarterback, the market will resolve based on the player who takes the most snaps at quarterback during their first offensive drive of the game. If multiple players take the same number of snaps on the Chiefs’ first offensive drive, the market will resolve to the player who took the first snap at quarterback.

This market may not resolve before the start of the Chiefs’ Week 1 regular season game. 

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the NFL (NFL.com); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Renan Santos finish in second place in the first round of the 2026 Brazilian presidential election?
markets.description:
A presidential election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., https://dadosabertos.tse.jus.br/).

markets.question: Will US crude oil reserves fall to 325M by June 5?

Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve as soon as the listed value is reached, or once data has been released for the final week ending on or before June 5, 2026, and the listed value has not been reached.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

Overnight CMA refinements and hourly observations will sharpen resolution before final Wunderground reporting.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (HIGH) $7.00 Week of May 4 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of May 4 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Congress passes Iran war powers resolution by May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if both the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate pass the same bill, measure, or resolution that seeks to limit U.S. armed forces military action in the recent US/Israel-Iran conflict by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

Legislation will qualify as seeking to limit U.S. armed forces military action in the recent US/Israel–Iran conflict if it explicitly seeks to restrict, terminate, or require congressional approval for U.S. armed forces’ hostilities, strikes, deployments, or other military operations against Iran or its proxy forces. Non-binding statements or measures that express disapproval, call for investigation, or otherwise relate to the US/Israel-Iran conflict without seeking to limit military action will not qualify.

A measure amended by either chamber will only qualify if the amended version is subsequently finally passed by both chambers in identical form.

The resolution sources will be official congressional voting records and a consensus of credible reporting.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

Non-binding statements or measures that express disapproval, call for investigation, or otherwise relate to the US/Israel-Iran conflict without seeking to limit military action will not qualify.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus reflects the repeated failure of Democratic-led War Powers resolutions to advance in a Republican-controlled Congress, with the Senate rejecting a sixth such measure yesterday on a 46-51 vote and the House defeating prior attempts by narrow margins like 213-214 in mid-April. These privileged resolutions, invoking section 5(c) of the 1973 War Powers Resolution to direct President Trump to terminate U.S. Armed Forces involvement in hostilities against Iran under Operation Epic Fury, have consistently fallen along party lines amid GOP support for the administration's strategy. The 60-day authorization clock expired May 1 without congressional approval, but Trump officials declared hostilities "terminated" via a fragile ceasefire, reducing urgency. With slim GOP majorities, no bipartisan momentum, and ongoing diplomatic talks, passage by May 31 appears unlikely despite new introductions like Rep. Crow's H.Con.Res.91.

markets.question: Will an Iranian agent be charged in the US by May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any Federal or State jurisdiction of the United States formally charges or announces a criminal indictment of any individual alleged to be acting as an agent of the Iranian government between market creation and May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

“Iranian agent” refers to any individual alleged to be acting on behalf of, under the direction of, or in coordination with the Iranian government (including its military or intelligence services) to conduct espionage, collect intelligence, or perform other covert operations that benefit Iran.

For the purposes of this market, the District of Columbia and any county, municipality, or other subdivision of a State shall be included within the definition of a State.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from US governmental sources; however, a wide consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors "No" at 77.5% implied probability for an Iranian agent—such as an IRGC operative or spy engaged in espionage or assassination plots—being charged by the Department of Justice by May 31, reflecting the absence of qualifying DOJ or FBI indictments in recent weeks. The March conviction of Pakistani national Asif Merchant in an Iran-linked murder-for-hire scheme targeting Donald Trump marked the last major such case, but no new charges against Iranian intelligence personnel have followed. Recent actions, including the April 19 arrest of Iranian national Shamim Mafi at LAX for sanctions violations tied to brokering arms sales to Sudan and the April 25 indictment of Jafar Tafakori for migrant smuggling, involve economic crimes rather than explicit agency allegations. Amid heightened U.S. sanctions on Iran weapons networks and ongoing regional tensions, including a naval blockade, traders see insufficient momentum for a qualifying development before the deadline.

markets.question: Will Anthropic have the best Coding AI model at the end of May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab for "Coding" is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Coding" Leaderboard tab at https://arena.ai/leaderboard/text/coding-no-style-control with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie still remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors Anthropic at 85% implied probability for the best coding AI model by end of May, driven by its Claude Mythos Preview topping the SWE-bench Verified leaderboard at 93.9%—nearly 20% ahead of OpenAI's GPT-5.4—while Claude Opus 4.7 secures second place. Recent April releases showcased agentic coding prowess in benchmarks like LiveCodeBench and enterprise tools such as Claude Code, enabling multi-hour autonomous development and fueling revenue growth past OpenAI's. OpenAI holds 11.5% on GPT-5.x momentum but trails in verified agentic tasks; Z.ai's GLM-5.1 launch adds upset potential at 4.8%, yet lacks matching ecosystem lock-in. Watch for late-May model drops or benchmark updates as resolution nears.

markets.question: Will Iain Black win the 2026 Conservative Party of British Columbia leadership election?
markets.description:
The 2026 Conservative Party of British Columbia leadership election is currently scheduled to be held on May 30, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the candidate who becomes the next leader of the Conservative Party of British Columbia as a result of this election.

Temporary, interim, or placeholder leaders appointed before the election will not be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known by April 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors Caroline Elliott at 41% implied probability to win the B.C. Conservative Party leadership, closely trailed by Kerry-Lynne Findlay at 35%, with Peter Milobar at 16%, reflecting a fragmented field among the final five candidates ahead of the May 30 announcement. A Research Co. poll released April 30 shows Elliott and Milobar leading vote consideration at 44% and 46% among 2024 Conservative voters, but Findlay's 41% share underscores her federal experience and broad favourability gains, keeping the preferential ballot race unpredictable. Swelling party membership to 42,000 since April has introduced new voters, diluting established support; the April 24 debate yielded no clear frontrunner. Late endorsements from dropouts like Warren Hamm (backing Yuri Fulmer) or final membership surges could consolidate ballots and create separation.

markets.question: Abstract FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Abstract's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Abstract doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Spread: Club Independiente Petrolero (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Copa Sudamericana game, scheduled for April 15 at 6:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Club Independiente Petrolero" if Club Independiente Petrolero win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Caracas FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on conmebol.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

Independiente Petrolero, mid-table in Bolivia's Primera División with mixed results such as a recent 0-0 stalemate against Guabirá, brings solid away form but faces travel and adaptation challenges. No major injuries or suspensions reported for either side, and limited head-to-head history leaves the matchup closely contested based on trader consensus, with group positioning implications heightening stakes.
